overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a wooden coastal pier, ascending stairs to a convenience store parking lot, and descending to a sandy beach. The clip transitions through distinct zones from the enclosed pier walkway to open beachfront with ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with white railings and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier toward the tower structures at the end

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
white painted wooden railings lining both sides of the pier
small buildings and structures on either side of the pier entrance
hazy mountains visible in the background beyond the pier
twin tower-like buildings with red roofs at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden pier with white railings toward two tower structures. The pier is empty with benches on either side, and mountains are visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition from pier to upper parking level

events.description: character turns right and begins ascending wooden stairs between the tower structures
exits wooden pier structure and enters asphalt parking lot with convenience store

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs from the pier level up to the street level parking lot

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with white railings leading upward
cracked asphalt surface with yellow parking lines
24-7 supermarket building with green signage and brick facade
red sports car parked near the store entrance
yellow and black striped traffic bollards

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs between the towers, transitioning from the pier to an upper parking lot. A convenience store with a red convertible parked outside comes into view as the character reaches the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: convenience store parking lot and sidewalk

events.description: character turns left and walks along the convenience store sidewalk
character turns left between buildings toward the beach access path

agents.ego_description: walking past the convenience store and turning down the alleyway toward the beach

entered.detail: red ATM machine mounted on the store wall
gray concrete sidewalk with red curb
narrow path between buildings leading toward the beach
white wooden fence along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the convenience store sidewalk, passing an ATM and trash bins, then turns down a narrow alleyway between buildings with wooden fences heading toward the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with ocean shoreline

events.description: exits built-up area and emerges onto open sandy beach with ocean view
character descends sandy dune toward the waterline

agents.ego_description: walking down the sandy path onto the beach and approaching the shoreline where people are relaxing under umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person standing near a beach umbrella on the right side of the beach

entered.detail: golden sand covering the beach area with visible footprints
calm blue ocean extending to the horizon
long wooden pier extending into the ocean with buildings at the end
green and yellow striped beach umbrella
blue and white patterned beach umbrella

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide sandy beach with the ocean and a distant pier visible. Walking past beach umbrellas and people relaxing on the sand, the character descends toward the waterline where the sand meets the sea.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed wooden pier that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit beachfront. It begins by following a character along a pier with white railings and benches, moving toward two tower structures with hazy mountains in the distance. As the character ascends wooden stairs between these towers, the scene shifts from the pier to an upper parking lot featuring a convenience store and a red convertible. The camera then tracks along the store's sidewalk past an ATM and trash bins before turning down a narrow alleyway flanked by wooden fences. Finally, the environment expands as the character emerges onto a sandy beach, passing umbrellas and relaxing crowds while descending toward the ocean waterline.
